question: Determine the total amount of quantifiable dividend capacity.

stage1_classifications.rationale: Builder basket permission directly contributes to dividend capacity aggregation.
Reallocable basket with cap_usd; directly quantifies dividend capacity.
Unlimited conditional basket; not quantifiable without ratio test result.
Has cap_usd/cap_grower_pct; quantifiable dividend-adjacent capacity.
Categorical tax distribution; no fixed cap, not directly quantifiable.
Categorical overhead basket; no fixed cap amount.
Unlimited on condition; not independently quantifiable.
No fixed cap; capacity depends on unrestricted subsidiary assets.
Reallocable basket with cap_usd; unused capacity flows to dividend capacity.
RDP ratio basket; specific, not reallocable, no quantifiable cap.
Builder RDP sub-source; general scope but no standalone cap value.
Restricted-purpose refinancing basket; irrelevant to dividend capacity.
Restricted-purpose equity-funded RDP; not relevant to dividend capacity.
IP subsidiary designation prohibition; unrelated to dividend capacity.
Aggregates builder sub-sources feeding into builder usage permission.
Starter sub-source with cap_usd; directly feeds builder basket capacity.
CNI sub-source with cap_grower_pct; feeds builder basket capacity.
ECF sub-source feeding builder basket; relevant to total capacity.
EBITDA sub-source with cap_grower_pct; feeds builder basket capacity.
Equity proceeds sub-source with cap_grower_pct; feeds builder basket.
Asset sale proceeds sub-source; no fixed cap, variable amount.
Investment returns sub-source; no fixed cap, variable amount.
Debt conversion sub-source; no fixed cap, variable amount.
IP disposition exception; unrelated to dividend capacity question.
IP license exception; unrelated to dividend capacity question.
Intercompany transfer exception; unrelated to dividend capacity.
Immaterial IP exception; unrelated to dividend capacity question.
Fair value disposition exception; unrelated to dividend capacity.

stage2_citations.quote: additional Dividends may be made...in an aggregate amount not to exceed the greater of $130,000,000 and 100% of Consolidated EBITDA for the most recently ended Test Period

stage2_answer: The total quantifiable hard-dollar floor for dividend capacity is $260,000,000, consisting of two independent general_purpose baskets: (1) the General RP Basket of the greater of $130,000,000 and 100% of LTM Consolidated EBITDA [Section 6.06(j), p. 196]; and (2) the Builder Basket (Cumulative Amount) with a starter floor of the greater of $130,000,000 and 100% of LTM Consolidated EBITDA, which also grows by 50% of cumulative Consolidated Net Income, retained ECF, 100% of equity proceeds, retained asset sale proceeds, investment returns, and debt conversion proceeds (greatest-of formula) since the first day of the fiscal quarter in which the Closing Date occurs [Definition of Cumulative Amount, p. 32]. Additionally, a restricted-purpose management equity basket permits up to the greater of $20,000,000 and 15% of LTM Consolidated EBITDA per annum (with carryforward) solely for equity repurchases from employees/officers/directors/consultants [Section 6.06(b), p. 195]. Separately, unlimited dividend capacity is available if pro forma First Lien Leverage Ratio is ≤ 5.75x (or no-worse test) [Section 6.06(o), p. 198], plus categorical/uncapped baskets for tax distributions [Section 6.06(c)], holdco overhead [Section 6.06(k)], cashless equity award settlements [Section 6.06(d)], and unrestricted subsidiary distributions [Section 6.06(p)] — none of which are quantifiable without current financial data.
stage2_reasoning_conclusion: The total quantifiable hard-dollar floor for dividend capacity is $260,000,000, comprising two independent general_purpose baskets each with a $130MM floor (Section 6.06(j) and the Cumulative Amount starter), plus a restricted-purpose management equity basket with a $20MM annual floor. Additional capacity under the builder basket (50% CNI, retained ECF, 140% EBITDA, equity/asset proceeds, investment returns) and unlimited capacity under the ratio basket (Section 6.06(o), if First Lien Leverage ≤ 5.75x) are variable and cannot be quantified without current financial data.
stage2_reasoning_analysis:
Step 1 — Classify baskets by capacity_category:

GENERAL PURPOSE (sum independently unless sharing a pool):
(A) General RP Basket [6.06(j)]: greater of $130,000,000 and 100% of Consolidated EBITDA (LTM). capacity_composition = 'fungible' with no shares_capacity_pool link identified to the builder basket, so treated as independent capacity.
(B) Builder Basket / Cumulative Amount [Definition of Cumulative Amount]: general_purpose, capacity_composition = 'computed_from_sources'. The basket starts on the first day of the fiscal quarter in which the Closing Date occurs and equals the greatest of: (i) the starter amount = greater of $130,000,000 and 100% of Consolidated EBITDA (LTM); PLUS cumulative 50% of Consolidated Net Income since anchor; PLUS retained ECF; PLUS equity proceeds (100%); PLUS retained asset sale proceeds; PLUS investment returns; PLUS debt conversion proceeds. The three-test aggregate (norm 6e76ed06_builder_source_three_test_aggregate) selects the greatest of the CNI, ECF, and EBITDA×140% components. Because the builder basket is time-dependent and variable, only the $130MM floor (starter amount) is immediately quantifiable as a hard dollar minimum. The EBITDA grower and other sources are variable. Note: the builder RDP basket (6.09(a)(A)) shares the Cumulative Amount (shares_with_rp_builder = true), so usage under RDP reduces builder RP capacity — no double count.

Step 2 — Check for fungibility/shared pool between general RP basket and builder basket: No shares_capacity_pool link is present in the data between these two baskets; they are independent pools. Sum them.

Step 3 — Quantifiable floor for general_purpose baskets:
- General RP Basket: $130,000,000 floor (grower: 100% LTM EBITDA)
- Builder Basket: $130,000,000 floor starter (grower: greatest-of formula including 50% CNI, retained ECF, 140% EBITDA, equity proceeds, asset proceeds, investment returns)
Hard dollar floor total: $130MM + $130MM = $260,000,000

Step 4 — Restricted purpose:
- Management equity basket [6.06(b)]: greater of $20,000,000 and 15% of Consolidated EBITDA per annum, with carryforward. Hard dollar floor = $20MM annually. Restricted to equity repurchases for employees/officers/directors/consultants.

Step 5 — Unlimited conditional:
- Ratio basket [6.06(o)]: unlimited if pro forma First Lien Leverage Ratio ≤ 5.75x (or no-worse test). Not quantifiable without financial data.

Step 6 — Categorical (no dollar cap; condition-based):
- Tax distributions [6.06(c)]: capped to standalone taxpayer liability — not quantifiable without tax data.
- HoldCo overhead [6.06(k)]: no dollar cap stated — categorical/unlimited for actual overhead.
- Equity award net settlement [6.06(d)]: unlimited for cashless exercise/tax withholding deemed repurchases.
- Unrestricted sub distributions [6.06(p)]: categorical — distributable assets of unsubs, not quantifiable without asset data.
